debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
⊢ ∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, (2 * k + 1) = n ^ 2

proof:
induction n with
  | zero => simp
  | succ n ih =>
    simp_all [Finset.sum_range_succ, pow_succ, mul_add, add_mul, mul_one, add_assoc]
    linarith
